text.title: Meta Demographic Targeting
text.summary: Geographic, age/gender, language, and device targeting parameters for Meta ad set targeting JSON.

rule.statement: Always specify at least one geo_locations entry; Meta requires a location to serve any ad.
rule.rationale: Without a location constraint, ad sets enter review indefinitely and fail to deliver.

example.note: Countries use ISO 2-letter codes. City keys are Meta place IDs from the search API.

rule.statement: Set age_min to 18 at minimum; Meta does not allow targeting under 18.
rule.rationale: Under-18 targeting triggers policy rejection and account flags regardless of product type.

example.note: Gender codes: 1 = Male, 2 = Female. Omit genders array to target all genders.
